description: §14.4/§18.7 E-TYPE-082 — non-fail construction in `return` position: `return MyError.Timeout("oops")` supplies a payload argument to the NULLARY `Timeout` variant. The return-statement construction site routes through the same variant-constructor arity check, so the code fires here as it does for `let`/`fail`. Incidental W-DEAD-FUNCTION/W-PROGRAM-001 ignored by superset matching.
rationale: §14.4: construction supplies exactly one positional argument per declared payload field; a nullary variant declares none, so any payload SHALL be a compile error (E-TYPE-082), independent of the enclosing statement form.
